subject: test(debug): cover console capture with jest instead of deferring to manual test
body:
Replaces the "please run console.error() in DevTools" manual step
with 11 unit tests that run under jest. Covers:

- console.error / console.warn each produce a source=console entry
- Original console fns are still invoked (DevTools behaviour preserved)
- First arg → event (truncated at 160 + ellipsis), rest → details
- Error instances preserve their stack in details
- Circular refs collapse to [Circular], React elements to [ReactElement]
- reentrant guard prevents infinite recursion when a subscriber logs
  to the console from within a subscription callback
- __debugPatched sentinel makes the patch idempotent under Fast
  Refresh / repeat module execution (no chained wrappers, no recursion)

react-native is mocked (Platform.OS: 'web', Platform.select, Dimensions)
so the web-only patch activates under jest's node test environment
without pulling in the jest-expo preset.

Totals: 52 → 63 tests. Updated CLAUDE.md, SESSION_NOTES.md, and
TESTING_GUIDE.md (test counts + dropped the manual step, kept the
three remaining crash-survival manual scenarios that genuinely
require a browser).

Tags: debug, tests, automation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch
